infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: B.CLEAN uses your location to show nearby customers, route to job sites, and document where work was performed.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: B.CLEAN uses your location while you are working a job to keep your map view, ETA, and arrival timestamp accurate. You can change this at any time in Settings.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: B.CLEAN uses the camera to capture before-and-after photos of completed cleaning work.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: B.CLEAN reads your photo library so you can attach existing job photos to a customer record.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: B.CLEAN saves job photos you capture in the app to your photo library so you have your own backup.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: B.CLEAN syncs your job schedule to your device calendar so reminders appear alongside your other appointments.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: B.CLEAN can import a contact you choose to quickly create a customer record. The app does not upload your contacts.
